title: fleischmannia coibensis
intro: Fleischmannia coibensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Costa Rica and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Fleischmannia coibensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
